bio.hero: Fullstack developer specializing in AI chatbot platforms — integrated 4 channels (Facebook, Zalo, Teams, Widget) for enterprise clients. I leverage AI tools to ship faster and deliver end-to-end, from backend APIs to mobile apps.
aboutPreview: I build production systems end-to-end — from NestJS + GraphQL backends to React frontends and React Native mobile apps. At my current role, I develop AI chatbot platforms serving enterprise clients across 4 communication channels.

I'm a fast learner who dives deep into new tech when the project needs it — from setting up Kubernetes staging environments to picking up React Native for mobile. Open to freelance and remote collaboration.
bio.full: I'm a fullstack developer with 1+ year of professional experience building AI chatbot platforms at an outsourcing agency. My work involves integrating chatbot services across Facebook, Zalo, Microsoft Teams, and web widgets for enterprise clients including universities and government organizations. I handle the full stack — NestJS + GraphQL APIs, React/Next.js admin dashboards, React Native mobile apps, and self-hosted Kubernetes staging environments. Before that, I led a 10-member intern team at FPT Software building a student management system with .NET. I use AI tools extensively to accelerate my workflow and I'm always ready to dive into unfamiliar tech when the project calls for it. Open to freelance, remote, and full-time opportunities.
bio.contact: Open to collaboration — freelance, remote, or full-time opportunities. Let's build something together.
